'''Puddra''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] who was assigned to the detention area of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Energy mining/Legends|energy mining]] facility on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mimban/Legends|Mimban]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye]]'' {{1st}}
